title: Numbers With Repeated Digits
titleCn: 至少有 1 位重复的数字

testcases.input: n = 20 Output: 1 Explanation: The only positive number (<= 20) with at least 1 repeated digit is 11.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: The only positive number (<= 20) with at least 1 repeated digit is 11.

testcases.input: n = 100 Output: 10 Explanation: The positive numbers (<= 100) with atleast 1 repeated digit are 11, 22, 33, 44, 55, 66, 77, 88, 99, and 100.
testcases.expectedOutput: 10 Explanation: The positive numbers (<= 100) with atleast 1 repeated digit are 11, 22, 33, 44, 55, 66, 77, 88, 99, and 100.
